sentence_reviews.text: Human-in-the-loop and sandbox controls bound agent authority through approvals, permissions, quotas, isolated execution, audit logs, and reversible actions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA 4th ed. agent and multiagent/planning/search topics; used as textbook support for agent environments, actions, search/planning, and game/multiagent concepts. General code-execution/sandbox concepts from the dependency label; packet lacks a dedicated sandbox/security reference.
sentence_reviews.notes: Approvals/permissions/sandboxes/audit logs are standard safety-control concepts, but no dedicated sandbox or HITL source is in the packet.

sentence_reviews.text: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Observe–plan–act agent loops, Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
